description: Clear confirmation — contact enthusiastically agrees to attend the masterclass

transcript.content: Hi Rahul, this is Priya calling from Freedom with AI. How are you doing today?
Hi Priya, I'm doing well. How are you?
I'm great, thanks for asking! So Rahul, I'm reaching out because we're hosting a free masterclass on AI automation for business owners this Saturday, March 15th at 3 PM.
Oh that sounds interesting. What's it about exactly?
It's a 90-minute hands-on session where you'll learn how to use AI tools to save 10-15 hours per week in your business. We cover automating client follow-ups, content creation, and lead management.
That sounds really useful actually. I've been wanting to learn more about AI for my coaching business.
That's great to hear! So can I confirm your spot for this Saturday at 3 PM?
Yes, please sign me up. Will I get a link or something?
You'll receive a WhatsApp message with the Zoom link and all the details. Will you be joining alone or bringing anyone along?
I might bring my business partner. So two of us probably.
That's wonderful, I'll note that down. You're all set for Saturday, March 15th at 3 PM. Looking forward to seeing you there!
Thanks Priya, looking forward to it. Bye!
Bye Rahul, have a great day!
